title: G2PLUS White Christmas Organza Bags 7x9CM: Snowflake Favour Bags for Presents, 100PCS Xmas Snowflake Gift Pouches for Reindeer Food, Christmas, Advent Calendars
features: 【Material】These snowflake christmas gift bags are made of organza, the Xmas bags are very tight, but also very permeable for various scents.
【Size】These little christmas gift pouches are 7CM*9CM. please allow 0.5-1cm error due to manual measurement. These small favor bags are ideal for advent calendar, small sweets, Reindeer food.
【Really well made】These snowflake favor bags are really well made, the band at the top edge can be pulled together evenly and well. They are durable and reusable.
【Very Pretty with Snowflake Design】The small christmas organza bags with snowflakes on which are very beautiful and good for little Christmas giveaways, to put a message and candle in.

【Variuosly Application】Beautiful christmas organza gift pouchs always bringing more cordiality. These organza bags are very christmassy with the silver snowflakes on them. perfect for packing small items for wedding favors, candy, christening almonds, Christmas favors, manufactured jewelry.
description: Product Description Christmas Snowflake Organza Gift Bags Christmas Snowflake Organza Gift Bags for Christmas Sweets, Advent Calendar The snowflake organza gift bags are made nice soft material with the silver snowflakes on them, which is very Christmassy and will make a small gift look special. These christmas organza bags are are very well stitched together, no loose threads. and the strings of these organza gift bags are tied well so doesn’t come apart when you pull together. Very lovely snowflake organza bags add a nice touch to the Christmas presents. You can use them for hanging sweets on Christmas tree. The video showcases the product in use.
